channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: People Are Convinced Nathan Fillion Is Reviving ‘Firefly’ Via… Instagram Posts?
item.description: Co-stars Gina Torres, Morena Baccarin, Sean Maher, Jewel Staite, and Summer Glau have all played a part in the mysterious stunt.

item.title: Corsair Sabre V2 Carbon Fiber and Magnesium Gaming Mice Review
item.description: It is worth using motorsports materials in a gaming mouse? As long as it's the same price as plastic.

item.title: Marathon is in a sprint
item.description: Marathon is weird as hell - and I mean that in the best possible way. The latest game from Destiny studio Bungie mixes the slick gunplay the developer is known for with a dark, and frankly bizarre, sci-fi universe. It's part of the burgeoning "extraction shooter" subgenre, where teams of players are dropped into a […]

item.title: Dell XPS 14 (2026) review: A beautiful laptop that excels at almost everything… except typing
item.description: There is so much to love about Dell's new XPS 14, it's hard for me to discuss it without sounding like a total fanboy. Its new design makes it incredibly thin and light. And Intel's Panther Lake chips give it a ton of power, even when it comes to games. After reviving the XPS brand from last year's ignominious rebranding, it's as if Dell was laser-focused on fixing all the issues we've had with the XPS 14 so far. Unfortunately, a shallow, unresponsive and hilariously error-prone keyboard kept me from truly loving the XPS 14. Simply put, it has trouble recognizing keys if you press them too qui...

item.title: 'We’d love to make lenses like these' — Fujifilm wants you to vote on the three 'dream lenses' it could make in the future. Here's how to have your say
item.description: Fujifilm hosted a live 'Focus on Glass' event on YouTube, proposing 14 lens concepts for the public to vote on. Which would you like to see become a reality?

item.title: 25 of the best early deals ahead of the Amazon UK spring sale — I've picked the top tech offers from £13.99
item.description: I've looked through the early offers at Amazon UK ahead of its Spring Deal Days event next week and hand-picked the 25 best deals that I recommend buying now.

item.title: Jones Mercury FASE Snowboard Bindings Review: The Best Fast Entry System
item.description: In! Out! In! Out! Jones’ latest fast-entry snowboard bindings mean you’ll never get left behind by a bunch of skiers again.

item.title: Local governments could deploy AI for good. Here’s how
item.description: Two urban innovation experts lay out the case. When considering AI’s impact in cities, many residents and government officials envision a dark future of unbridled surveillance, hollowed-out city halls and unaccountable bots calling the shots based on biased training data. We, on the other hand, embrace a much more optimistic vision. With ambitious local leadership, AI, and especially the coming wave of agentic AI, can offer a profound opportunity not only to make government services more efficient but also to transform how cities fulfill their end of the social contract. ...

item.title: These 5 prompts really showed how ChatGPT 5.3 still has plenty of ‘cringe’, despite what OpenAI says
item.description: ChatGPT 5.3 still has some cringe to it despite OpenAI claims

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 will get new rival very soon — and the leaked Moto Razr 70 could beat it in four key ways
item.description: Some leaked specs for the Motorola Razr 70 specs have leaked — and they suggest it could be a major rival for the Galaxy Z Flip 7.

item.title: The Morning After: Apple takes on cheap Windows laptops and Chromebooks with the $599 MacBook Neo
item.description: Right off the back of the iPhone 17e, new iPads and MacBook Airs, Apple also announced a keenly priced new laptop. The MacBook Neo is a multi-colored low-cost Mac ($599), running on an iPhone chipset with most but not all of the hardware features you find on the MacBook Air and Pro. All models of the MacBook Neo ship with an extremely scant 8GB of RAM, which might be the main productivity bottleneck for demanding tasks. The Neo has a 13-inch Retina display, a 1080p webcam, two USB-C ports, a headphone jack and optional Touch ID, if you're willing to pay a little more. A lot has been said about...

item.title: Cette trottinette électrique parfaite pour les longs trajets perd presque 100 € de son prix à l’approche des beaux jours
item.description: Avec une autonomie de 60 km et une vitesse de pointe de 25 km/h, la Xiaomi Electric Scooter 5 Pro est une trottinette électrique idéale pour les longs trajets. Avec cette promotion, vous pourrez la trouver pour moins de 425,99 euros.

item.title: Google Maps adopte un nouveau logo proche de Gemini
item.description: Google modernise l’identité visuelle de Google Maps avec un nouveau design tout en douceur, basé sur des dégradés de couleurs. Un changement inspiré du logo de Google Gemini qui confirme le virage de l’entreprise vers l’intelligence artificielle.

item.title: Remedy confirms Jesse Faden ‘is not playable’ in Control Resonant — but still claims ‘she’s a big part of the game’
item.description: Remedy Entertainment has confirmed that Control's main character, Jesse Faden, won't be playable in Control Resonant alongside her brother Dylan.

item.title: LastPass warns of scam using fake email chains spoofing account hacking 'to draw attention and generate urgency' in users
item.description: What would you do if you could eavesdrop on an ongoing social engineering attack against your LastPass account?

item.title: More than a million users a day are signing up for Claude — as Anthropic hits out at its 'legally unsound' US government ban
item.description: The US government might have had enough of Claude, but it seems that plenty of users are ready to install it.

item.title: These 2 Apps Help Me Make Sense of My 100K Screenshots
item.description: The shameful pile of screenshots on my phone was as useless as it was disorganized. Rodeo and Swipewipe are helping to change that.

item.title: 'I'm just along for the ride': Ted season 3 is cast into further doubt as star confirms there are currently 'no plans' to continue
item.description: Season 2 has only been ours for a day, but I'm already begging for Ted season 3 to happen. According to one star, the show's future is a sadly vague one.

item.title: Pragmata will now launch one week earlier in April as Capcom moves up the game's release date
item.description: Capcom has announced that it has changed the release date for its upcoming sci-fi action game Pragmata.

item.title: The World of ‘A Court of Thorns and Roses’ Will Expand in a Big Way
item.description: Author Sarah J. Maas announces the next two books in her best-selling fantasy series—and teases the future of its screen adaptation.

item.title: Meet your new phone away from phone
item.description: Unihertz's booth at MWC was a little out of the way, but those who did find it all seemed to want to pick up the Titan Elite 2. Sure, the cosmic orange color attracted attention, and the QWERTY keyboard reminded one showgoer of his old BlackBerry. But once I picked it up, I could see […]

item.title: 'The only thing missing is zip ties': A legendary audio brand just released its first streamer, and it supports every standard under the sun
item.description: Leak's new TruStream audio player is all heritage charm, but under the hood there's every modern connection and service you could wish for

item.title: Wired earbuds are back! Meze’s new IEMs would look great with your MacBook Neo — but they're more expensive than a whole laptop
item.description: Titanium shells, plus an innovative diaphragm design featuring '80 layers of gold'

item.title: New York lawmakers want AI chatbots to stop pretending to be doctors or lawyers
item.description: A proposed bill would ban professional advice from AI, and allow users to sue if they’re harmed. New York is the latest state to consider a bill that would prohibit AI chatbots from dispensing advice that licensed professionals would normally give, such as medical or legal advice. The bill would also allow people who believe they were harmed by such advice to sue the operator of the chatbot....

item.title: Samsung veut s’affranchir des puces Qualcomm et vise du « tout Exynos » sur ses futurs Galaxy S
item.description: Samsung aurait pour l'ambition d'équiper l'ensemble de ses futurs Galaxy S de processeurs Exynos. C'est tout du moins ce qu'a laissé penser un haut responsable de la marque coréenne.

item.title: 'Just give us what we want, Disney': the original Star Wars trilogy is coming to Blu-ray again — but not in the way fans want
item.description: 'A long time ago, in a galaxy far, far away...' was the last time we got the theatrical cut of Star Wars at home — could that be changing?

item.title: Tracy Morgan, Daniel Radcliffe, and the Reggie Dinkins cast weigh in on the shows improv
item.description: "The Fall and Rise of Reggie Dinkins" stars comedy legends like Tracy Morgan and Bobby Moynihan. How much improv did they bring to set?

item.title: UK government delays AI copyright rules amid artist outcry
item.description: The UK government is working on a controversial data bill that would allow AI companies like Google and OpenAI to train their models on copyrighted materials without consent. However, following a two month consultation, it looks like passage of the law will be delayed. "Copyright is going to be kicked down the road," a person with knowledge of the matter told The Financial Times. Responses by stakeholders during the consultation period weren't favorable to any of the government's proposed ideas for use of copyrighted materials, the FT's sources said. There's no expectation now that an AI bil...

item.title: 7 Laptop Docking Stations to Unlock the Full Desktop Experience (2026)
item.description: Laptop docking stations expand what your laptop can do, and I’ve been testing the best of the best to see which you should buy.

item.title: Le télescope James-Webb a suivi l’astéroïde « destructeur de ville »… et sa découverte relance l’histoire
item.description: Depuis sa découverte il y a un peu plus d’un an, l’astéroïde 2024 YR4, le « destructeur de ville », nous a fait passer par tous les états. Avec une chance sur 32 de tomber sur la Terre, il est resté, un temps, l’astéroïde le plus menaçant jamais observé. Puis il s’est tourné vers la Lune,...

item.title: Grocery Outlet is closing stores, joins growing list of retail chains shuttering locations in 2026
item.description: The California-based value chain said it expects to close 36 stores. The news comes amid growing concerns around food access. Grocery Outlet is joining the ranks of retailers planning to shutter storefronts this year.

item.title: From Ukraine to Iran, Hacking Security Cameras Is Now Part of War’s ‘Playbook’
item.description: New research shows hundreds of attempts by apparent Iranian state hackers to hijack consumer-grade cameras, timed to missile and drone strikes. Israel, Russia, and Ukraine have also adopted this trick.

item.title: OpenAI just dragged its own brand
item.description: Winning the Department of War as a client made OpenAI look ‘opportunistic and sloppy,’ according to Sam Altman himself. It sounds like a brag-worthy business coup: not just snagging a high-profile client, but doing so just after your chief rival’s deal with that same client unraveled in a brutally public way. But artificial intelligence pioneer OpenAI’s Pentagon deal didn’t end up being a brand-halo event. To the contrary, “it just looked opportunistic and sloppy”—and that’s the judgment of OpenAI’s CEO, Sam Altman....

item.title: Your employees aren’t disengaged. They’ve got screen fatigue
item.description: The data isn’t just about eye health—it’s about how modern work has been designed, and what leaders choose to normalize For the past few years, leaders have been trying to decode what’s happening to attention at work. We’ve debated burnout, quiet quitting, and whether younger employees simply approach productivity differently than previous generations. But new workplace data suggests something far more basic may be happening: many employees aren’t disengaged—they’re visually exhausted....

item.title: ChatGPT 5.4 is apparently a big spreadsheet fan — and even comes with some special Excel and Google Sheets tools
item.description: ChatGPT is now using its 5.4 Thinking model for deeper reasoning, and it's even better at handling "professional work."

item.title: DJI Mini 3 : ce petit drone de loisir qui filme en 4K est à son prix le plus bas sur Amazon
item.description: Bonne nouvelle pour les amateurs de belles images aériennes ! Le DJI Mini 3 voit son prix fondre sur Amazon : seulement 266 euros au lieu de 379 euros habituellement. C’est une super affaire pour ce petit drone léger, simple à piloter et capable de filmer en 4K.

item.title: Netflix fonce droit sur l’IA avec l’acquisition de la start-up de Ben Affleck
item.description: Le géant du streaming vient de réaliser une acquisition majeure en s'offrant InterPositive. Cette discrète entreprise technologique fondée par l'acteur et réalisateur Ben Affleck développe des outils d'intelligence artificielle conçus spécifiquement pour l'industrie du cinéma.

item.title: The Jackery HomePower 3000 power station is over $1,000 off at Amazon — power your whole home for less
item.description: Get the best portable power station deal. Save 48% on the Jackery HomePower 3000 at Amazon.
